name: HMS Kurd (FY 639)
events: 31 Jul 1940 In the early hours of the day, HMS Kashmir (Cdr. H.A. King, RN), collided with the Auxiliary M/S trawler HMT Kurd (Skr. J.H. Petherbridge, RNR). HMS Kashmir, which was on patrol off the Humber had to return to Immingham. She later went to Hull for repairs which were completed on 21 August. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
